title: Sense Realtime Payload
description: Real-time power snapshot delivered via WebSocket or the /realtime_update REST endpoint. Contains whole-home wattage, solar output, grid exchange, voltage, frequency, and currently active devices.

w.description: Current whole-home power consumption in watts.

solar_w.description: Current solar panel production in watts. Zero for non-solar monitors.

grid_w.description: Net grid exchange in watts. Positive indicates import from grid; negative indicates export to grid.

voltage.description: AC voltage readings per electrical leg in volts. US residential panels report two legs.

devices.description: List of currently active detected devices and their power draw.

w.description: Current device power consumption in watts
